business_information.description: nitedHealthcare is the largest health insurance carrier in the United States and a primary division of UnitedHealth Group, serving over 52 million members globally as of 2023. It provides comprehensive health benefit plans for employers, individuals, Medicare/Medicaid beneficiaries, and military families, partnering with extensive networks of doctors and hospitals. The company aims to make healthcare more affordable and accessible through diverse insurance products and digital tools.

business_context.vibe_modeling_instructions: REMEDIATION MODE — fix the existing United Health Care model WITHOUT restructuring it. --- MUST DO --- The following steps address issues found by static analysis and MUST be completed. MUST DO STEP 1 — INVESTIGATE AND RESOLVE ALL UNLINKED _ID COLUMNS: There are 293 columns ending with _id that have no FK relationship. For EACH unlinked column, follow this decision process IN ORDER: (1) Is this column actually a foreign key? If it is an external system identifier, device reference, or peripheral hardware ID (e.g., gps_tracker_id, legacy_system_id, external_reference_id, scan_device_id, communication_device_id, validator_device_id, telematics_device_id), it is NOT a FK — rename it to remove the _id suffix (e.g., gps_tracker_code) and KEEP it. (2) If it IS a valid FK, does a matching parent table ALREADY EXIST in the model? The FK column MUST END WITH the target table's PK (e.g., driver_employee_id ends with employee_id, so it links to the employee table). If a match exists, LINK it. (3) If no existing table matches, apply the CORE BUSINESS OPERATIONS FILTER: Only CREATE the missing parent table if the entity is a CORE business/operational concept central to the organization's primary mission AND is referenced by MULTIPLE tables. Do NOT create tables for peripheral devices, external system lookups, ancillary sub-systems, or non-core industry products — use KEEP_AS_IS instead (rename to _code/_number suffix). (4) If the column appears hallucinated (makes no business sense for this table), DROP it. DO NOT blindly create tables for every unlinked column — most can be resolved by linking to existing tables, recognizing they are external system references (KEEP_AS_IS), or recognizing they are not core business entities. MUST DO STEP 2 — CONNECT DISCONNECTED TABLES: 1 tables have no relationships at all — they are completely isolated from the rest of the model. Each disconnected table should be linked to at least one related table. COMPLETE LIST: contract.document_template. MUST DO STEP 3 — DEDUPLICATE TABLES: The following table names appear in multiple domains and MAY represent the same business concept — review their attributes and descriptions; if they serve the same function, merge into a single source of truth and preserve all relationships pointing to the surviving table: communication_template, collection_agency, notification_template. MUST DO STEP 4 — BREAK CIRCULAR DEPENDENCIES: The model contains 10 circular foreign key dependencies where tables reference each other in loops. Remove the least important FK in each cycle to break the loop. Top cycles: Circular FK dependency detected: quality.star_rating -> quality.satisfaction_score -> quality.report_submission -> quality.accreditation...; Circular FK dependency detected: finance.financial_period -> finance.general_ledger -> finance.financial_period; Circular FK dependency detected: enrollment.enrollment -> enrollment.open_enrollment_window -> product.enrollment_window -> marketing.campaign...; Circular FK dependency detected: risk.member_risk_profile -> enrollment.enrollment -> enrollment.open_enrollment_window -> product.enrollment_window...; Circular FK dependency detected: enrollment.enrollment -> enrollment.open_enrollment_window -> product.enrollment_window -> marketing.campaign...; Circular FK dependency detected: enrollment.enrollment -> enrollment.open_enrollment_window -> product.enrollment_window -> marketing.campaign...; Circular FK dependency detected: quality.star_rating -> quality.satisfaction_score -> quality.improvement_plan -> quality.star_rating; Circular FK dependency detected: marketing.campaign -> marketing.creative -> marketing.campaign; Circular FK dependency detected: risk.member_risk_profile -> enrollment.enrollment -> enrollment.group_enrollment -> sales.order...; Circular FK dependency detected: fraud.transaction -> fraud.investigation -> risk.member_risk_profile -> enrollment.enrollment.... MUST DO STEP 5 — REMOVE SHARED DOMAIN PREFIX: 2 table(s) in the shared domain have a redundant 'shared_' prefix. The domain already provides context. Tables: shared_payment, shared_program_enrollment. Rename them by removing the prefix. MUST DO STEP 6 — REMOVE UNJUSTIFIED DOMAIN PREFIXES: 3 table(s) have domain name as prefix but no name collision justifies it. Only use domain prefix when two domains have identically-named tables AND the domain context is semantically meaningful. Rename: credentialing_specialist -> specialist; eligibility_rule_set -> rule_set; sales_representative -> representative. MUST DO STEP 7 — REMOVE PRODUCT PREFIX FROM ATTRIBUTES: 10 attribute(s) have their product name as redundant prefix. The table already provides context. COMPLETE LIST OF RENAMES: finance.lease.lease_amount -> amount; finance.lease.lease_liability -> liability; finance.lease.lease_payment_amount -> payment_amount; finance.lease.lease_term_months -> term_months; finance.lease.lease_term_years -> term_years; member.segment.segment_owner -> owner; sales.commission.commission_period_end_date -> period_end_date; sales.commission.commission_period_start_date -> period_start_date; sales.commission.commission_rate -> rate; service.contact_center.contact_center_location -> location. MUST DO STEP 8 — FIX SNAKE_CASE NAMING: 1 name(s) are not valid snake_case. All table names, attribute names, and domain names must use lowercase snake_case (e.g., my_table, not MyTable or my-table). MUST DO STEP 9 — FIX FK COLUMN NAME TO END WITH TARGET PK: 98 FK column(s) have names that don't end with the target table's PK. FK columns MUST END WITH the target PK (e.g., driver_employee_id ends with employee_id → valid; billing_address_id ends with address_id → valid). When the target table name differs from the FK prefix (e.g., order.customer_id → order_customer), rename the FK to end with the target PK (order_customer_id). The FK-suffix rule takes precedence over the no-product-prefix rule for FK columns. TOP MISMATCHES: authorization.auth_assignment.assignment_rule_id -> fraud_rule; authorization.auth_rule.superseded_by_rule_id -> fraud_rule; authorization.request.type_id -> request_type; authorization.utilization_review.plan_assignment_id -> coverage; ABSOLUTE CONSTRAINTS: Do NOT drop any domains. Do NOT create many-to-many association or junction tables. Do NOT remove tables unless they are exact semantic duplicates. Do NOT rename domains.

_next_vibe_metadata.summary: The United Health Care model has 2 errors and 316 warnings (MUST DO) plus optional quality improvements.
_next_vibe_metadata.data_modeler_notes: Focus on MUST DO steps first — broken relationships, missing tables, and structural issues. Then consider the OPTIONAL steps for quality polish.
